1.address: 78/4 Soi Ratchadamnoen Klang Tai, Khwaeng Wat Bowon Niwet, Khet Phra Nakhon, Krung Thep Maha Nakhon 10200, Thailand

reviews.author: Another Foodies
reviews.text:
We came here for the food since the main restaurant is under renovation, but unfortunately, it seems the chef has lost his touch. We’ve been regulars for years, and it’s been getting worse each time.

The service was already poor before they moved, and now it’s even worse. We were the only table there, with two staff walking around, yet it was impossible to get anyone’s attention.

At these prices, it’s hard to justify coming back — especially after things have gone wrong three times in a row at a place that charges five times the market rate. Really disappointing from a restaurant we used to love.

reviews.author: KiwiTraveller
reviews.text: Great location for exploring old town and Khao san area. Easy walk to markets, restaurants, temples and grand palace. Close to areas for both tourists and locals. Staff on reception are helpful.

reviews.author: Steve Hilton
reviews.text:
Methavalai Residence Hotel

Check-in:
- Friendly, Helpful and Efficient. 🤗👏
- Rating: 5/5

Room:
- Room: Superior Twin
- Tv: Only Thai channels available 😢
- Shower: The water was cold and the pressure wasn’t good. 😢
- The bed mattress was quite hard 😢
- The pillows were hard, lumpy and not comfortable, which really affected our sleep.
- We asked the hotel to change the pillows, which they did, but the replacement pillows were also hard and lumpy. 😢
- The lighting in the room is very bad. 😢
- Rating: 2/5

Wi-Fi
- The Wi-Fi in the room was either very slow or just didn’t work.
- I tried numerous Wi-Fi connections, but they were all the same. 😤
- Rating: 1/5

Location:
- Quiet location. 😊
- The hotel is only a 9 min walk from Khao San Road, 11 mins from Wat Saket Ratchawora Mahawihan and 16 mins from the Rajadamnern Muay Thai Stadium.
- There’s also a 7-eleven only 4 mins away.
- Rating: 4/5

Price paid per night: $39

Important Note:
When you check-in you will be asked to leave a 1,000 THB deposit for your room key.

Overall Rating: 3/5

reviews.author: Lizaray Escala
reviews.text: Great value hotel. Hidden at the back of the main road but still easy to access. The rooms were standard but clean and efficient. We always got back with freshly cleaned room. The staff were so nice. A plus because it has a spa just next door!

reviews.author: Harun Uğurlu
reviews.text: Clean and spacious rooms. Checked in early. Very friendly staff. Good location, easily accessible with bus and there is a 7-eleven nearby.

2.address: 55/8 Trok Soi Ban, ซอย พานถม แขวงบ้านพานถม เขตพระนคร กรุงเทพมหานคร 10200, Thailand

reviews.author: MyMajestic hair
reviews.text: I've been feening to stay at a hostel. Most of them tho seem rundown, unorganized and unclean. I booked the shared room here because this is my idea of what a hostel is lmao. A touch of luxury in a shared room with equally adventurous people. Breakfast was good, they were accommodating, the room was clean and smelled good. The bathroom could have been cleaner and better stocked but it was a great experience overall.

reviews.author: #TJA Travel Avocation
reviews.text: Nice hotel basic Modern. I booked this hotel for a pool but I didn't go in even once in 7 days. And almost no one had a Bay customer these days like me. I don't know if they intentionally made it so.Too cold water. Breakfast is good but needs a lot of improvement and most products are not made with quality ingredients. Juice no. banana apple .The omelette that the waitress makes is very nice.Friendly girl. Generally, the staff from breakfast and cleaners are more friendly and polite than the reception.We put water in the room every day and they change towels every day. 🙏 Thanks

reviews.author: Olga Surova
reviews.text:
A very nice hotel, comfortable rooms, great location.
The swimming pool is indeed not the highlight of this place, more of a nice a nice plus. If you are searching for a hotel to spend time at the pool it is not the best choice.
Luggage storage is very messy, right in the corridor without any safety.
If you are two and you return to the hotel separately, the person without the card is not able to access the floor because of the locked door at ground floor. Somebody has to go down to open it or you need to fetch a person from the reception. This is very inconvenient.

reviews.author: Jemima Welbourn
reviews.text: Very clean and comfortable hotel, we stayed in the hostel dorms and they were perfect! Bathrooms were very clean and the reception area and pool were really nice. We would definitely return to this hotel

reviews.author: Suresh Kumar
reviews.text:
Reception was friendly, accommodating and helpful. The property is a mix of hostel and hotel but both buildings are not connected. The rooms were spacious and comfortable. Basic toiletries were provided. We could just sleep in all day as the bed was uber comfortable.

The hotel's location is quite inwards so you can imagine its a tough walk/cab ride to the main city parts.

Breakfast was plain boring; not much variety.

I didn't get their names but front desk staff were very helpful with us and offered many suggestions for our varying needs.

Will be glad to come back again!

3.google_name: The Raweekanlaya Bangkok Wellness Cuisine Resort
3.address: 64 QG94+42F, 172 Krung Kasem Rd, Khwaeng Bang Khun Phrom, Khet Phra Nakhon, Krung Thep Maha Nakhon 10200, Thailand

reviews.author: George Cooper
reviews.text:
Absolutely top tier, professional massage center. I went in the day we arrived because I was unbelievably stiff from the 20 hour flight. After a 60 minute Royal Thai Massage, I left feeling like I hadn’t been on a plane at all. Not exaggerating.

The next day after many miles of walking around the city and exploring temples, my legs and feet were sore, and I felt like the day was pretty much done there. But after a 90 minute Royal Thai massage with extra focus on feet, legs and lower back, with a ton of targeted stretching, I felt absolutely no soreness or tightness.

Mina was my therapist both times and if you’re lucky enough to stay at The Raweekanlaya Bangkok
Wellness Cuisine Resort, I highly, highly recommend her. She’s absolutely fantastic.

reviews.author: Shakir Thowseen
reviews.text:
I'm giving them 5 stars because they care. We were a party of 12 and booked with breakfast only to realize it's all non halal. But they were willing to cook separately for us every day during our stay and it was actually good food.

The location is great and the rooms are okay.. missing a few things like a chair and desk.. small poll etc.., but overall good. Id recommend this place!

reviews.author: Bo Biz
reviews.text:
Raweekanlaya: A Tranquil Oasis in the City... Like Stepping Into Nature's Heart!
​I highly recommend this hotel that truly made me feel rested and rejuvenated: Raweekanlaya Bangkok. This is not just a hotel; it's a beautiful and charmingly preserved old house dating back to the Reign of King Rama VI!

​What I loved the most:

​Profound Serenity & Nature: Even though it’s in the heart of the city, this place is incredibly quiet and shady with big trees. It feels truly relaxing and lets you recharge your energy completely.

​Architecture and History: Staying in a historical old building with such a rich past felt truly special. Every corner of the hotel is beautifully decorated and full of unique stories.

​Exceptional Event Venue: This place is also perfect for hosting small parties or an intimate wedding ceremony in a warm and cozy atmosphere. The beautiful green spaces and the vintage building create a romantic and memorable backdrop.
​If you are looking for accommodation that offers more than just a place to sleep—but an experience close to nature, beautiful old architecture, or a unique wedding venue—I highly recommend

Raweekanlaya! I'm giving it 5 stars without hesitation!

reviews.author: Simge Tekin
reviews.text:
Over the years, we have stayed in many hotels and traveled to many countries, but we have never encountered such a friendly, kind, and attentive team before.
The rooms were spotless.
Everything we needed (toothbrush, shampoo, shaving kit, etc.) was provided, and the pool was very clean. The hotel was very quiet and beautiful.
On our first day, we came across a prayer event, and they even included us in it.
When we returned to our room, we found a photo of us taken there along with a lovely treat placed by our bedside. I was so touched that I almost cried. It was a wonderful memory for me.
Thank you to everyone. If we come to Bangkok again, we will definitely stay here.
Thank you!

reviews.author: Stephanie Ostara
reviews.text: I had a wonderful stay, the place is a relaxing haven in the middle of Bangkok. The breakfast was delicious, the staff are kind, attentive and friendly! Everything was perfect, I will definitely be back 🙏🏽✨️

4.prospect_search_name: Lamphu Tree Hotel Bangkok (corrected from House)
4.address: 155 Prachathipatai Rd, Khwaeng Ban Phan Thom, Khet Phra Nakhon, Krung Thep Maha Nakhon 10200, Thailand

reviews.author: Modell Bleu
reviews.text: Tucked away on one of the cities many canals. Quaint looking hotel but no road access. Catered to the backpacker, newbie crowd. A friend booked us there as we were in town to see the muay Thai fights at Rajadamnern. Suffice to say, this place is not my style. The grounds are well kept and the pool is clean. The staff are happy and helpful. Our rooms were 219 and 220. Are on the side of the building so there is only a view of a wall next door. The patios are also adjoining so there isn't much privacy. Walls are thin so you will hear everything going on next door unless you are a heavy sleeper. For one night it was tolerable. The area around the hotel is great if you want to see the way the city looked in the 50' and 60's. Don't get wrong, im not bashing the place. They were fully booked. It just wasn't to my taste.

reviews.author: Lovette M. N
reviews.text: Good hotel, nice pool out front. Good breakfast. Great location. Bed is a little hard and the ac can be slow but overall good hotel stay.

reviews.author: S
reviews.text: I had an amazing stay at this hotel! The location is absolutely perfect—very close to temples and everything I needed. The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming, making my stay even more enjoyable. My room was clean, comfortable, and well-maintained, with a lovely view. The peaceful atmosphere made it a great place to relax after a day of exploring. I highly recommend this hotel and will definitely come back again!

reviews.author: Louis van Hövell
reviews.text: Highly recommended. I stayed here twice with my girlfriend, during a 3 week trip in Thailand. Very nice loctation alongside a quiet canal in an older part of the city. With lots of things to do/eat/see nearby. Tasteful interior, very friendly and helpful staff, good swimming pool. Nice breakfast. Great price/quality balance. I would certainly like to come back. Thank you, Louis

reviews.author: Alasdair Watson
reviews.text: The hotel is great value.  Peaceful location.  Lovely staff.  I would come back again in a heartbeat. The owner has a great restaurant down the canal too.  Such a great stay.

5.address: 75, 77 Ram Buttri, Khwaeng Chana Songkhram, Khet Phra Nakhon, Krung Thep Maha Nakhon 10200, Thailand

reviews.author: Monica Betambeau
reviews.text: I love this place, I use it every time I'm in Bangkok now.  It's definitely got a traveller vibe to it, but being an old Dharma Bum it suits. Always totally helpful people at the desk, lovely courtyard to chill in for however long you need to.  Decent well priced cafe, bang in the heart of Bangkok 5 minutes away from the Kao San Rd. A bit noisy at night and the rooms are basic but that's reflected in the price.  Totally recommend Lamphu Guest House.

reviews.author: Soraia Horta
reviews.text:
Calm and comfortable spot right in the centre of old Bangkok. The location is great for walking around, and even with everything happening nearby, the hotel stays quiet. The room was simple but clean, with a good bed and AC.
They provided a hairdryer, bottled water and toilet paper. The shower has good pressure and temperature, though the whole bathroom gets wet when you use it.
The staff were friendly and helpful, and check-in was quick and easy, for the price it’s solid value.

reviews.author: Ipshita Maliat Rahman
reviews.text: Great location for people staying in Khao san. The rooms amd washrooms were clean, and the main road is very close by. Absolutely loved the staff, specially the two women at the reception (they were so helpful, even helped us with getting our bus tickets to Koh Samui - and the bus stop is very near too). Loved loved my time there. If I visit bangkok again 100% staying here! ❤️

reviews.author: Hay
reviews.text: A great place to stay if you want to be located by Khaosan without hearing loud music. Was quiet the room was clean with great air con and the garden was lovely to relax and have breakfast. Friendly staff the only thing I would say was the bed was really hard.

reviews.author: Lenka Plchova
reviews.text: Nice room and bathroom, good location. A bit noisy due to the number of rooms and guests. The reception staff during check-in seemed quite irritated and not very friendly.

7.google_name: Nouvo City Hotel - โรงแรมนูโว ซิตี
7.address: 2 Soi Samsen 2, Khwaeng Ban Phan Thom, Khet Phra Nakhon, Krung Thep Maha Nakhon 10200, Thailand

reviews.author: Zayd B
reviews.text:
We recently stayed at this hotel and it was one of the best stays we have ever had. The hotel is conveniently located near the Chao Phraya river so easy access to Icon Siam and Asiatique. Its also not too far from other tourist places via grab etc.
The buffet breakfast here is one of the best I have ever had anywhere with a huge variety of dishes with unique flavours and rotated regularly. The rooms were also comfortable, clean with all amenities and were serviced regularly. There is an excellent gym , pool and even a kids play area. The reception and staff were the best and so pleasant & helpful. Their own Sara restaurant also had delicious food. I love this hotel and would definitely would stay here again should I visit Bangkok again.

reviews.author: Elyaas Makki
reviews.text:
Top Class Hotel
Spent 5 days over the Christmas break at this amazing hotel.
The staff were fantastic from the moment the taxi arrived at the door including the porters taking in our suitcases and receptionists who checked us in.
Check-in was pretty rapid, the room was spacious and the bed very comfortable.  The additional sofas in the room were just what were needed after a long day out in the heat.
The breakfast buffet was fantastic, the variety of foods and drink was just incredible from the traditional Thai foods to western food such as waffles and maple syrup.
There was also a chef at the egg station available to cook whatever you wanted.
The plus point for us was that the food was halal certified.
In the evening, the food at the Sara Restaurant is of the highest quality and has  meals suitable for all palates.
As for location, the hotel is based in the Old City, so many of Bangkok's main tourist attraction are about 30 mins walk away, and the infamous Khao San Road less than 10 minutes walk. Tuk-tuks are readily available on the street corner just outside the hotel if needed.
There is a nice gym right next to the roof-top swimming pool as well as a spa with lots of treatments available.
The best part of the stay were the staff who were so welcoming and polite throughout, eager to help whenever needed.
We came back for a one night stay after visiting Chiang Mai and Phuket, and the level of service was exactly the same.
If we go ever go back to Bangkok, I would definitely stay at the same hotel.

reviews.author: Hevpot UK
reviews.text:
Had a good three night stay here. The room was good. Although it was a superior twin, we didn't realise there was no window, a small frosted one in the bathroom only. Didn't cause us an issue but the description on Agoda is a little misleading.
The staff is great, the room clean, the beds comfortable, the breakfast variety and quality is impressive, the area around is safe and quiet but does have energy. There's a 711 next door which is handy.
Both pools are clean and enticing after a day's sightseeing!
Lots of water fountains in the hotel, free to use and therefore cutting down on single use bottles, a great initiative.
There is a safe in the room.
If in this area again, we would definitely return.

reviews.author: Raymond Valiant
reviews.text: Nouvo City Hotel offers a stay in a strategic location, especially for travelers, at Samsen, close to the heart of old Bangkok. Situated near Khaosan Road, the hotel is well connected, making it easy to explore the city. The hotel reflects an early-2000s style. While the design feels a bit dated, the rooms are clean, well maintained, and comfortable overall. Hot water in the bathroom is reliable. On the downside, the air conditioner is rather noisy and not easy to regulate, which may affect light sleepers. Facilities include a small swimming pool, a spa, and a gym. Breakfast is served buffet-style and is fairly complete, and halal. However, the selection is not particularly memorable. The staff: friendly, polite, and consistently helpful, contributing positively to the overall experience. Basically, Nuovo City Hotel is a good-value option with a great location and attentive service. While some aspects could benefit from modernization, it remains a reliable and comfortable choice for low cost visitors to Bangkok.

reviews.author: Sue Noplaneboss
reviews.text: Large room, comfortable bed, big bathroom. Our side of the hotel had a window but just onto other buildings. Air con worked well. Pool area was nice. Huge buffet breakfast. About 30min walk to main attractions but only 10mins to the river and can take ferry from there if you like.

8.google_name: Public House Bangkok, a Member of Design Hotels
8.address: 249 Sukhumvit 31, Khwaeng Khlong Tan Nuea, Watthana, Krung Thep Maha Nakhon 10110, Thailand

reviews.author: Dtown
reviews.text:
Stayed for two nights as a solo traveller in March 2026. Check in process was fast and efficient, reception was very accommodating.

Room was excellent, there was no view but that was fine with me. Room was very clean and tidy. Bed was very comfortable and in room facilities were good. Bathroom was lovely.and shower was excellent very hot with great pressure.

All the staff were wonderful, very friendly and helpful

I would definitely stay here again.

reviews.author: Keith Moore
reviews.text: This is a very nice boutique hotel.  Check in was very friendly and efficient.  The room itself was nice, but I would have liked a tub in the bathroom.  But I must say, the water pressure in the shower was fantastic (this is a major rating factor for me as it tells me the money that has been put into the hotel infrastructure).  The bed was large and comfortable.  The blue-tooth speaker was a nice touch, as were the cookies.  Parking was available.  One negative was that upon check-out they insisted upon ‘checking’ the room even though I assured them we had not used the (well-stocked) mini-bar.  Please trust your guests at this price point.

reviews.author: Jimmy
reviews.text: The hotel is very modern, and probably quite a "westernised"  experience - but is truly such a comfortable stay in Bangkok. The location is perfect, so many good resteraunts nearby, coffee places, spas and at the same time it's quiet and peaceful which is good when you're exploring Bangkok all day. The room is very clean- and the room we had was spacious. The staff are really great. I thought the stay was worth it for the price. One recommendation if you're staying is to go to a resteraunt called Siam Nora. It's nearby - and one of the best dining experiences we had.

reviews.author: Marci Scott
reviews.text:
The hotel has a pleasant lobby, a convenient location, and I enjoyed the mocktail program, which was thoughtfully done. At checkout, the staff also offered snacks and a cookie, which was a nice and appreciated gesture.

However, during my stay I noticed a strong, persistent musty odor in the room that did not improve with ventilation. There were no visible signs, but the smell caused physical discomfort for me, including throat irritation and skin sensitivity.

I completed my stay, but the odor significantly impacted my comfort. I did not report the issue to staff during the stay, as I was focused on managing how I was feeling at the time.

This review reflects my personal experience. Other guests may not be affected, but those who are sensitive to odors or air quality may want to take this into consideration.

reviews.author: Irish 14
reviews.text:
Not the 5 star hotel we expected.
Hotel design looks cool and location is perfect. Not all breakfast dishes were as tasteful. There is no rooftop bar nor are there sun beds at the rooftop pool. Bar/ restaurant are awkwardly in the open at the ground floor which makes it less inviting to dine or have a drink.

Rooms are good. Nice beds. Water pressure perfect. Also novelty deforested.

Overall we felt we overpaid for the service and facilities you would get elsewhere in Bangkok.

9.address: 26/1 Soi Sukhumvit 53, Khwaeng Khlong Tan Nuea, Watthana, Krung Thep Maha Nakhon 10110, Thailand

reviews.author: Erin Campbell
reviews.text: Wow! Our family just loved this hotel. I wish we could have stayed longer. We were greeted by the cutest human with 5 excellent iced teas, which was so nice after a long flight. Our family suite was spacious and very clean. We were provided with free bottled waters and snacks. The beds were extremely comfortable. In the morning, we had one of, if not the best breakfast we have ever enjoyed traveling. The staff are incredible. Highly recommend it Jen traveling

reviews.author: Qi Wun Ho
reviews.text:
Rooms are nicely design, considerate of regular usage, cozy and warm.

As usual, Thai has good to excellent service, especially for boutique hotel like volve hotel, staff are not only friendly but considerate, pass us water while we are eating dessert in the lobby, not even Japanese service level may reach this, amazing.

First Mr & Mrs smith series hotel, really impressive service level And good experience in it.

Location, it’s not like Siam area but Japanese area, lots of Japanese restaurants and an amazing mango sticky rice store (5-10 mins walk) you must try.

reviews.author: Sherina Tan
reviews.text:
Great stay overall. The hotel is conveniently located near Thong Lo BTS, with plenty of cafes and food options in the area.

The service was excellent—staff were attentive and helpful throughout my stay, and housekeeping kept my room very neat and tidy.

Some highlights:

* Free minibar with curated snacks
* After I checked out, the hotel kindly offered me access to a shower room before my flight, which was a very thoughtful touch.

Overall, a very pleasant experience and I would recommend this place to anyone staying in the area.

reviews.author: Tamara Hayes
reviews.text:
We had a great stay at this hotel! The hotel is very beautiful and modern, and the staff are exceptionally friendly, polite, and always happy to help. They truly go out of their way to make your stay as comfortable as possible.
The location is excellent—you can get everywhere very quickly. At check-in, we were welcomed with a complimentary drink and given a helpful overview of nearby attractions, restaurants, and shopping areas, including tips on how to reach them either on foot or by public transportation.
Our room was perfectly adequate for our three-day stay. Everything was very clean and nicely designed. The room was well equipped with a kettle, a wide selection of snacks, tea and coffee, a hairdryer, and a fantastic shower with great water pressure—definitely a big plus!
Breakfast was served from 7:00 to 10:30 a.m. and was absolutely delicious. There was a great selection of both sweet and savory dishes, and you could add extras at no additional cost. We ordered the French toast with fruit and added scrambled eggs and bacon and the smoked salmon eggs benedict. There was also a small buffet available.
Overall, we were very satisfied with our stay and would definitely recommend this hotel!

reviews.author: S Tan
reviews.text:
“Care” and “Thoughtfulness” are words I would associate with Volve - the hotel is designed with care; you get a sense of warmth and care the moment you step into the hotel; everything is so well thought of for the guest.

Room: corner room
Clean, cosy, comfortable.
All amenities are present for a comfortable stay - toiletries, slippers, lock safe, fridge, adequate power points, and great wifi
Of note - the snacks in the minibar are all complimentary! And I really liked the inclusion of curated local Thai snacks - these were really yummy and not something one would find commonly in shops. A really nice touch!

Location:
Fantastic and convenient. The street along whivj Volve is located at is quiet. Thong Lor BTS station was just a 5 minute walk away. There are of course many cafes and restaurants in the area, which makes this location really great. I had no problems with finding a cab via ride hailing too.

Service:
Fantastic hospitality. Staff were friendly and very helpful. Check in and check out were smooth and efficient.

In sunmary: great stay at Volve and highly recommended!
